<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Need to re-arrange. Hypothesis: reading order follows path through green connector
# 1. Red slot 1 = yellow (correct)
# 2. Red slot 2 = red (correct)
# 3. Green slot 1 = green (pre-placed, correct)
# 4. Green slot 2 = blue
# 5. Green slot 3 = pink
# 6. Red slot 3 = orange
# 7. Red slot 4 = purple
# Red slot 5 stays empty
# 
# Need to undo: orange(green2), pink(red5), blue(red4), green(red3)
# Then place: blue(green2), pink(green3), orange(red3), purple(red4)

action([
    {'action': 'ACTION7'},  # undo orange from green slot 2
    {'action': 'ACTION7'},  # undo pink from red slot 5
    {'action': 'ACTION7'},  # undo blue from red slot 4
    {'action': 'ACTION7'},  # undo green from red slot 3
])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
